rules.summary: The main agent must make core code changes directly.
rules.evidence: 핵심 코드 수정은 메인 에이전트가 직접 합니다

rules.summary: Before the final commit of mechanically delegated work, the main agent must inspect the diff and pass the TypeScript, lint, and test gates.
rules.trigger_intent: creating the final commit after mechanical implementation was delegated to a Sonnet subagent
rules.evidence: 메인이 diff를 직접 검수하고 tsc/lint/테스트 게이트를 통과시킬 것

rules.summary: Do not create the final commit before running /agent-review.
Implement changes in separate logical units instead of making all changes at once.
rules.trigger_intent: editing files during a multi-step implementation
rules.evidence: 한 번에 모든 변경을 하지 않고, 논리적 단위로 분리

rules.summary: For complex logic, write a failing test before editing the implementation.
rules.trigger_intent: editing complex business logic, algorithms, state management, parsing, or serialization implementation before a failing test exists
rules.evidence: Red: 구현 전에 실패하는 테스트를 먼저 작성

rules.summary: In the Green TDD phase, write only the minimum implementation needed to pass the test.
rules.trigger_intent: editing implementation code during the Green phase for complex logic
rules.evidence: Green: 테스트가 통과하는 최소한의 구현 작성

rules.summary: During the Refactor TDD phase, preserve passing tests while cleaning up the code.
rules.trigger_intent: refactoring complex logic after its tests pass

rules.summary: Run cargo check and cargo clippy to validate Rust changes.
rules.trigger_intent: validating a stage that contains Rust changes

rules.summary: Run TypeScript type-checking and linting to validate TypeScript changes.
rules.trigger_intent: validating a stage that contains TypeScript changes

rules.summary: Commit each implementation stage immediately after its validation passes.
rules.trigger_intent: finishing a logical implementation stage whose validation has passed
rules.evidence: 각 단계의 검증이 통과되면 해당 변경사항을 즉시 커밋합니다

rules.summary: Use a commit message that matches the changes being committed.
rules.evidence: 커밋 메시지는 변경 내용에 맞게 작성

rules.summary: The main agent must directly edit the fix after a debugging investigation identifies the cause.
rules.trigger_intent: editing code to fix a bug after its cause has been established
